title: CUBIC: Unsupervised Detection of Conceptual Biases via Vision-Language Embeddings
description_es: Este trabajo presenta un enfoque novedoso para detectar sesgos conceptuales en modelos de visión por computadora utilizando representaciones de visión-lenguaje.
abstract: Vision-language models have become increasingly powerful, but understanding and detecting biases in their representations remains challenging. This paper introduces CUBIC, an unsupervised method for detecting conceptual biases via vision-language embeddings, providing insights into model behavior and fairness.

citations.apa: Méndez, D., Bontempo, G., & Ficarra, E. (2025). CUBIC: Unsupervised Detection of Conceptual Biases via Vision-Language Embeddings. Information Systems Frontiers.
citations.mla: Méndez, David, et al. "CUBIC: Unsupervised Detection of Conceptual Biases via Vision-Language Embeddings." Information Systems Frontiers, 2025.
